sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n88028" key="promhnuth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προμην-ῡτής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n88028.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one who gives information in advance,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:173:19" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">173.19</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
